title: The Road to the Rooftop Opens
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Yamato, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Kid, Unknown person #7 as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yamato!! We don't get to choose our fathers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your hands being bound are one thing, but even though you hate your father so much...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why have you allowed your heart to be bound as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What did you say!!?

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Woah!! Young Master Yamato!! You mustn't!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's the symbol of Lord Kaido's power!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I too...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Want to go out to sea and have adventures!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just like open, I want to live freely!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hehe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's more like it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Waha haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Daha Haha Haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Haha Haha Haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Doesn't anyone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's unfortunate. You're so strong and we get along so well!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If only I could get these off... then someday surely!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I will also go out to sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Tell me! How's it like outside Wano!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A lot of youngsters have started setting out to sea right!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Youngsters?! Ah, yes! There's this guy called "Caven- something"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's all the rave right now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: None can compare to me, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've heard that there are some DANGEROUS guys wreaking havoc in each of the blues recently.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Just a

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: "Kid" in the south.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "LAW" in the north, "bege" in the west...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that said, the most formidable of them all,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: will set out to sea in a few years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: My little brother!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's sure to stir up a storm!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times are you going to tell me about your brother?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As many times as I want! quit complaining and listen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: OW!! Oww!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to be honest... I was the first one to damage THIS....!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: But then, ace said...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "Until I come back...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This will serve as my warning to Kaido....!!''

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: father was very angry about it, but in the end, he never met ace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, there WAS a pirate WHO tried to save Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: “So, yes,”

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Huh? Father?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah... Kaido is my father.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WHAT...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, sorry!! I forgot to tell you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But I really despise that man!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember?? I told you that I am open, didn't I?!

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.text: You're not making any sense!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I under- stood most of what you said...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop being so formal and get back here already!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We express our gratitude to you for treating our wounds!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But still, why tell us about this man now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He died two years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ..!! is that so!?

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: ACE WAS...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YES! All this while I believed ace would return...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And have been training to become a kunoichi ever since, but even knowing that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Bro Luffy was so insensitive about it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, sorry about that. That's just how luffy is.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you know Tama, that incident was really painful for Luffy too.

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 60 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
